inputs.label: Atomic Number (Z)
inputs.businessContext: Number of protons in the nucleus of the atom.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of protons in the nucleus of the atom.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de protons dans le noyau de l'atome.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de protones en el núcleo del átomo.

inputs.label: Shielding Constant (S)
inputs.businessContext: Screening constant due to inner electrons reducing the effective nuclear charge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Screening constant due to inner electrons reducing the effective nuclear charge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İç elektronların etkin çekirdek yükünü azaltması nedeniyle oluşan perdeleme sabiti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Abschirmungskonstante durch innere Elektronen, die die effektive Kernladung reduziert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante d'écran due aux électrons internes réduisant la charge nucléaire effective.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante de apantallamiento debida a electrones internos que reducen la carga nuclear efectiva.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ثابت الحجب الناتج عن الإلكترونات الداخلية الذي يقلل الشحنة النووية الفعالة.

inputs.label: Principal Quantum Number (n)
inputs.businessContext: Principal quantum number of the outermost electron shell.

businessContext_i18n.en: Principal quantum number of the outermost electron shell.
businessContext_i18n.tr: En dıştaki elektron kabuğunun baş kuantum sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre quantique principal de la couche électronique la plus externe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número cuántico principal de la capa electrónica más externa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد الكم الرئيسي لأغلفة الإلكترونات الخارجية.

inputs.label: Scaling Factor
inputs.businessContext: Empirical adjustment factor to match experimental ionic radii.

businessContext_i18n.en: Empirical adjustment factor to match experimental ionic radii.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Deneysel iyon yarıçaplarına uyacak şekilde ampirik ayarlama faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Empirischer Anpassungsfaktor zur Übereinstimmung mit experimentellen Ionenradien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'ajustement empirique pour correspondre aux rayons ioniques expérimentaux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de ajuste empírico para igualar radios iónicos experimentales.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل تعديل تجريبي لمطابقة أنصاف الأقطار الأيونية التجريبية.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
